summary: Bug fix verification: Testing removeChild React DOM error fix. ALL conditional rendering converted from '&&' pattern to ternary '? : null' across App.js, ReservationSystem.jsx, AdminPanel.jsx, and MenuSection.jsx. VERIFIED: No removeChild or NotFoundError console errors during complete reservation flow (date->time->details->confirm->success), menu interactions, language switching, and admin panel operations.

hydration_warnings.issue: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be child of <option> and <select> - caused by Emergent visual editor wrapper spans
hydration_warnings.note: Does NOT cause removeChild error or black screen

hydration_warnings.issue: React hydration warning: <tr> cannot be child of <span>, <span> cannot be child of <tbody> - caused by Emergent visual editor wrapper spans
hydration_warnings.note: Does NOT cause removeChild error or black screen

passed_tests: ✅ Homepage loads without console errors - no removeChild or DOM errors

✅ Complete reservation flow: RESERVAR MESA -> select date (Feb 25 Wednesday) -> select time (12:30) -> fill details (Test User Bug Fix, +34600000000, test@test.com, 2 guests) -> Continuar -> Confirmar -> SUCCESS page with QR code displayed - NO removeChild errors during any step transition
✅ Menu section: Clicked Carta tab, switched between 3 categories (handhelds, favorites, elite), clicked menu item to open modal, modal displays with WhatsApp and WEB buttons - no errors

✅ Admin panel at /admin: Login with admin/reservas -> dashboard loads with 4 stats cards, reservations table visible, switched to Settings tab, switched back to Reservations tab - no removeChild errors
✅ Language switcher: Clicked globe icon, switched ES -> PT (Onde a precisão...) -> EN (Where precision...) -> ES (Donde la precisión...) - NO removeChild errors during any language change

test_methodology.console_monitoring: Captured all console messages and page errors via page.on('console') and page.on('pageerror')
test_methodology.error_filter: Specifically watched for 'removeChild' and 'NotFoundError' patterns which were the reported bug
test_methodology.full_flow_testing: Tested complete user journeys, not just individual components

critical_code_review_comments: The ternary conversion fix (condition ? JSX : null) successfully prevents the removeChild error caused by React DOM reconciliation issues with the && pattern
Hydration warnings from Emergent visual editor wrappers (<span data-ve-dynamic>) are separate from the removeChild bug and do not cause black screen
seed_data_creation: Created test reservation: Test User Bug Fix, +34600000000, test@test.com, 2 guests, 2026-02-25 12:30
context_for_next_testing_agent: removeChild bug fix VERIFIED. All conditional rendering using '&&' pattern converted to ternary '? : null' in App.js, ReservationSystem.jsx, AdminPanel.jsx, MenuSection.jsx. No black screen or DOM errors observed during extensive testing of reservation flow, menu interactions, language switching, and admin panel. The only console warnings are React hydration warnings from Emergent visual editor wrapper spans - these are cosmetic and do NOT cause the reported bug.

rca_of_the_issue.original_bug: Uncaught NotFoundError: Failed to execute 'removeChild' on 'Node'
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: React conditional rendering using {condition && <JSX>} pattern can cause DOM reconciliation issues when condition changes, especially with dynamic content
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Converted all instances of {condition && <JSX>} to {condition ? <JSX> : null} which provides explicit null handling for React's virtual DOM diffing algorithm
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Complete end-to-end testing confirmed no removeChild errors during any user interaction
